agent_notes: 先读 `api-blueprint.agent.json`，再读 route shard，最后才看生成物
Use route shards for exact request, response, stream, and channel model shapes.
Use generated artifacts only for language-specific invocation details after locating them in artifacts.

read_order.purpose: Compact cross-service index for routes, schemas, connections, targets, and artifacts.
Shard directory index; use it when the compact route summary is not enough.
Open the route shard for request/response models, connection messages, and target imports.
Only inspect generated source when the artifact/import index points to a target-specific entry.
